hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "⚡ Welcome to Azure Functions! Checking prerequisites..."; az --version > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo "✅ Azure CLI" || echo "❌ Azure CLI — install: https://aka.ms/installazurecli"; func --version > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo "✅ Core Tools" || echo "❌ Core Tools — install: npm i -g azure-functions-core-tools@4"; node --version > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo "✅ Node.js" || echo "❌ Node.js — install: https://nodejs.org"'
